_comment: Manual gear layer applied in scripts/build-gear.mjs over the spiritvalemarket catalog (the default item list, which lags the live game). Order applied: fromBase44 -> add -> patch -> craft. `fromBase44` = slugs pulled from the newer/richer base44 dump (data/raw-base44/equipment.json) through the same buildItem transform (no hand transcription, no fabricated numbers). `add` = full hand-authored item objects for items in NO source. `patch` = shallow-merge fields onto an already-built item (parsedStats is recomputed). `craft` = { slug: { zoneSlug, zoneName, materials } } sets/fixes a craft recipe.

add.name: Grave Helm
add.description: Pale teeth gnash silently, because helmets should not need jaws.

add._note: Not present in any data source (newer than both snapshots). Type/cardSlots/base Atk-Matk unknown — type 'Book' inferred from a bible being a caster weapon; base stats omitted rather than fabricated. Refine when in-game data is captured.
add.name: Exorcist Bible
statsSecondary: Chance to autocast Turn Undead when hit: +3% per refine

parsedStats.label: Chance to autocast Turn Undead when hit: +3% per refine
